title: Western Blot Analysis Protocol
author: Kiichi Hirota
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x9mfr46
materials: Detect chemiluminescence using LAS-4000mini image analyzer.

steps.title: Scrape cells and transfer the suspension to a 1
steps.instruction: Scrape cells and transfer the suspension to a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 x g for 5 minutes at 4°C and collect the supernatant in a new microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Determine protein concentration by using DC ™ Protein Assay Kit
steps.instruction: Determine protein concentration by using DC ™ Protein Assay Kit.

steps.title: Load 35 µg of total protein on a SDS-PAGE gel
steps.instruction: Load 35 µg of total protein on a SDS-PAGE gel.

steps.title: Run the gel for 1 h at 100 V
steps.instruction: Run the gel for 1 h at 100 V.

steps.title: Transfer proteins onto a PVDF membrane...
steps.instruction: Transfer proteins onto a PVDF membrane using Trans-Blot Turbo™ Transfer System.

steps.title: Wash the cells with ice-cold PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash the cells with ice-cold PBS and add ice-cold RIPA buffer with cOmplete™ Protease Inhibitor Cocktail.

steps.title: Incubate the lysate on ice for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate the lysate on ice for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Place the blot in Blocking One...
steps.instruction: Place the blot in Blocking One and incubate with agitation for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Incubate the blot with appropriate dilutions...
steps.instruction: Incubate the blot with appropriate dilutions of primary antibody at 4°C overnight.

steps.title: Place the blot in TBST and...
steps.instruction: Place the blot in TBST and wash three times, 5 minutes each.

steps.title: Incubate the blot with the species-matched...
steps.instruction: Incubate the blot with the species-matched horseradish peroxidase-conjugated secondary antibody for 1 hour.

steps.title: Place the blot in TBST and...
steps.instruction: Place the blot in TBST and wash three times, 5 minutes each.

steps.title: Add Chemi-Lumi One Super to cover...
steps.instruction: Add Chemi-Lumi One Super to cover the blot and incubate for 1 minute.
